summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mealtap Technologies landing page. All backend APIs working correctly and frontend UI/UX fully functional with successful form submissions.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Status check endpoints (POST/GET) working
Pitch deck request endpoints (POST/GET) working
Waitlist request endpoints (POST/GET) working
Form validation working for missing required fields
Hero section renders with Lagos background image
Navbar displays with MEALTAP branding and all navigation links
All sections render correctly (Problem, Solution, How It Works, Market Stats, Business Model, Team, CTA/Footer)
Problem section shows correct stats (60%, 8%, 67%)
Market Stats section shows correct data ($1.04B, 235M, 95%, 65%+)
How It Works section shows all 5 steps
Team section displays founder info (Atolagbe Michael O.)
Pitch Deck modal opens and displays all required fields
Waitlist modal opens and displays all required fields
Pitch Deck form submits successfully to backend API
Waitlist form submits successfully to backend API
Modal close buttons work (X button and backdrop click)
Scroll navigation works for all sections
Forms have data-netlify='true' attribute for Netlify form collection
Solution section renders with phone mockup
Business Model section renders with revenue streams
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
